name: get_current_date
description: Mandatory at the start of every call and before interpreting relative dates like today, tonight, tomorrow, bugün, bu akşam, yarın, ce soir, or demain. Returns the current Paris date in ISO format for tools and natural Turkish spoken text for the caller.

name: create_reservation_request
description: Use this tool when the caller wants to make a new reservation at Golden Meat. Only call this tool after collecting and confirming the customer's name, phone number, number of guests, reservation date, reservation time, language, and special request if mentioned.

reservation_date.description: Requested reservation date in YYYY-MM-DD format

reservation_time.description: Requested reservation time in HH:mm format

language.description: Caller language: fr, tr, or en

special_request.description: Any special request, dietary need, celebration, terrace preference, child seat, or additional note

name: modify_reservation_request
description: Use this tool when the caller wants to modify an existing reservation. Collect the caller's name, phone number, original reservation date/time if known, and the requested new date/time.

original_reservation_date.description: Original reservation date if known, YYYY-MM-DD

original_reservation_time.description: Original reservation time if known, HH:mm

name: cancel_reservation_request
description: Use this tool when the caller wants to cancel an existing reservation. Collect the caller's name, phone number, reservation date and time if available.

name: handoff_to_staff
description: Use this tool when the caller explicitly asks to speak with a human, has an urgent issue, complains, asks about a complex situation, or the assistant cannot confidently handle the request.

reason.description: Why the caller needs human assistance

conversation_summary.description: Short summary of the caller's request

name: log_call_summary
description: Use this tool at the end of the call or when a useful summary should be saved. It records the call outcome, caller language, intent, and summary. This tool is silent. Do not say please hold before calling it. After calling it, say only a short goodbye if the caller is ending the call.

intent.description: reservation_create, reservation_modify, reservation_cancel, staff_handoff, restaurant_info, other
